raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged {$160.00} by XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX for a yearly subscription renewal. I had originally subscribed through an Amex promotion in XXXX for {$140.00}, but this year it auto-renewed without my knowledge, without any prior email notification or consent, and at a higher price. 

I canceled the subscription immediately once I noticed the charge, and I have not used the service at all since it renewed. I also contacted American Express to request support, but they declined to dispute the charge or issue a goodwill refund. 

This transaction was processed without my awareness, for a service I did not knowingly approve, did not use, and no longer want. Despite being a loyal Amex customer since XXXX and using multiple cards ( Platinum, Gold, and Blue Cash Preferred ), I received no meaningful support. 

I am now stuck with a {$160.00} charge for something I never used and never intended to renew. I am asking for a full refund and requesting that CFPB investigate this charge and how Amex handled the dispute process. 

Amex Case ID : XXXX
